title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapped growth playbook from $0 to $10M ARR in the span of 117 days to $1M and beyond. He covers strategies for reducing churn, product-led growth, SEO optimization, pricing experiments, and decision-making frameworks for early-stage founders.
